defaultFlyers.title: Software Engineering Intern – Summer 2025
defaultFlyers.description: Join our team at a local Honolulu tech startup for a 12-week paid summer internship. Work on real products with a small agile team.

defaultFlyers.title: Campus Career Fair – Spring 2025
defaultFlyers.description: Meet over 40 employers hiring UH students. Bring your resume and dress professionally. Open to all majors.

defaultFlyers.title: Biology Study Group – Genetics Final Prep
defaultFlyers.description: Forming a study group for BIO 375 Genetics final exam. Meeting twice a week in the library. All levels welcome.

defaultFlyers.title: Part-Time Barista – Kaimuki Coffee Shop
defaultFlyers.description: Looking for a friendly, reliable barista 15–20 hrs/week. Flexible scheduling around classes. Tips included.

defaultFlyers.title: IEEE Student Chapter – New Member Meeting
defaultFlyers.description: Interested in engineering and tech? Come check out UH's IEEE chapter. Pizza provided. No experience needed.

defaultFlyers.title: Beach Cleanup Volunteer Event
defaultFlyers.description: Help keep our shores clean! Gloves and bags provided. Community service hours available upon request.

defaultFlyers.title: End of Semester Rooftop Social
defaultFlyers.description: Celebrate the end of spring semester with food, music, and great views. Free entry with UH student ID.

defaultFlyers.title: Data Science Research Assistant Wanted
defaultFlyers.description: Professor seeking undergrad RA to help with ML research project. Python experience required. 10 hrs/week, paid.
